name: North Hills Country Club
about: North Hills Country Club, established in 1908, is a historic country club in Montgomery County offering an exclusive golf experience. The club features an 18-hole course surrounded by trees and diverse programming. Amenities include casual and fine dining at the clubhouse, a swimming complex, and event spaces. Membership provides access to the Invited Network of hundreds of country clubs and business clubs nationwide, along with special offerings at more than 1,000 hotels, resorts, and entertainment venues. The club hosts weddings, corporate meetings, tournaments, and social events to create community connections.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to the Invited Network of 300+ clubs nationwide
Premium amenities including fine dining and swim complex
Coaching and club fitting services available
Exclusive member benefits and event hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: Casual and fine dining available at the clubhouse, including Meehan's dining room
Alcohol service available in dining areas and for events

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The club offers club fitting services, and members typically use their own clubs. For lessons or fitting, equipment may be provided.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not permitted for general play. Dining options are available at the clubhouse, including Meehan's dining room.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole play time varies depending on course conditions and pace of play, typically taking 4-5 hours for members.

faq.question: Is the club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the club offers junior golf programs including 'Crush It! Youth Golf Lessons' and has swimming facilities. Certified junior golfers 17 and under can play unaccompanied after 3pm.
